summary: Classified the PR-inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and post-merge close are disabled. Routed the one security-sensitive PR to central security handling, kept already-closed PRs closed, kept useful open PRs open, and isolated two PRs that need human technical judgment because review-bot blockers remain unresolved.

actions.reason: Already closed; do not emit a close action for a closed PR.
Useful but not merge-ready; keep open as related session-state work rather than closing or escalating the whole cluster.
Already merged and closed; no further worker action is valid.
Release signing and dependency-graph authorization are security-boundary work, so this PR must route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Open useful candidate for a linked Teams threading bug, but not eligible for automated close or merge here.
Independent maintainer-owned PR; leave open for normal maintainer review.
Whether this is a correct auth/gateway typing fix versus an unsafe suppression requires maintainer technical judgment.
Useful linked PR for open Android issue #88014, but active follow-up remains; keep open.
Open useful candidate for linked Discord status issue #92715, but it lacks required proof and is not eligible for automated merge or closure.
Unresolved bot findings require technical correction or maintainer decision; no fix or close path is permitted in this job.

needs_human: #88883 requires maintainer technical judgment on whether the OAuth/gateway type changes are correct or only suppress failures.
#48396 has unresolved Codex/Greptile review blockers around the wrong preview field and committed planning document; no fix or close action is allowed by this job.
